name: line shack
hints: A remote line shack with a telegraph key. Look around carefully.
LOOK FLOO to examine the floor - there's a loose plank!
MOVE PLAN or OPEN PLAN to reveal a root cellar below with treasures.
LOOK FLOO reveals loose plank. Remove it to access root cellar (34) with pelts treasure. S=trail (32).
notes: Line shack. LOOK FLOO reveals loose plank hiding root cellar (34) with pelts treasure. S=trail (32).
